pathAssistantSteps.info: Once necessary sign-offs for KYC and contract reviews are in place, deals can move to contract signature stage. Only then can the contract be sent to the signatories.
Once the proposal has been issued, the opportunity moves to this stage where the bargaining takes place, finalizing the scope of services and agreeing all the commercial terms.

Developing a deeper understanding of the prospect’s business, decision makers, decision making process, budget, requirements and pain points etc. Ultimately allowing the sales person to decide early on if this is an opportunity worth investing time pursuing – it’s different to move an opportunity to closed lost at this stage than after we’ve spent time developing it, issuing proposals etc. and is a helpful metric to have when measuring sales team performance.
Finalizing and issuing of the proposal.
Nailing down the specifics of the requirements, including engaging partners etc.
